              (try ring_nf at h11 вКҐ) <;>
              (try simp_all [tan_eq_sin_div_cos, mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]) <;>
              (try nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (S.ѕЙ * t.val)])
            })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              field_simp [h5, h6, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos] at h11 вКҐ
              <;>
              ring_nf at h11 вКҐ
              <;>
              simp_all [tan_eq_sin_div_cos, mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
              <;>
              nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (S.ѕЙ * t.val)]
            })
        exact h10
      have h8 : (tan (S.ѕЙ * t.val) = (2 : вДЭ)) вЖТ (- S.ѕЙ вАҐ sin (S.ѕЙ * t.val) вАҐ IC.xвВА + cos (S.ѕЙ * t.val) вАҐ IC.vвВА = 0) := by
        intro h9
        have h10 : tan (S.ѕЙ * t.val) = (2 : вДЭ) := h9
        have h11 : - S.ѕЙ вАҐ sin (S.ѕЙ * t.val) вАҐ IC.xвВА + cos (S.ѕЙ * t.val) вАҐ IC.vвВА = 0 := by
          have h12 : tan (S.ѕЙ * t.val) = (2 : вДЭ) := h10
          have h13

avoid complications with square roots (and since squares are easier to work with), perhaps we can instead write:
`v(t) = 0 вЖФ вАЦx(t)вАЦ¬≤ = вАЦxвВАвАЦ¬≤ + вАЦvвВАвАЦ¬≤ / ѕЙ¬≤`, which is equivalent to the original statement since square roots

have hвВБ : вИВвВЬ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 вЖТ вАЦ(IC.trajectory S) tвАЦ = вИЪ(вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ^2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ/S.ѕЙ)^2) := by sorry
  have hвВВ : вАЦ(IC.trajectory S) tвАЦ = вИЪ(вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ^2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ/S.ѕЙ)^2) вЖТ вИВвВЬ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 := by sorry
  exact вЯ®hвВБ, hвВВвЯ©

apply Iff.intro
  ¬Ј -- Prove the forward direction: if the velocity is zero, then the norm condition holds
    intro h
    have hвВБ : вАЦIC.trajectory S tвАЦ = вИЪ(вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ ^ 2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ / S.ѕЙ) ^ 2) := by
      have hвВВ : вИВвВЬ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 := h
      -- Use the fact that the velocity is zero to simplify the expression for the norm
      simp_all [trajectory_eq, trajectory_velocity, norm_add_sq, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul,
        abs_of_nonneg, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq, sq_nonneg, add_nonneg, mul_self_nonneg]
      <;>
      (try
        norm_num) <;>
      (try
        field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq, sq_nonneg, add_nonneg, mul_self_nonneg]) <;>
      (try
        ring_nf) <;>
      (try
        norm_num) <;>
      (try
        linarith) <;>
      (try
        simp_all [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq, sq_nonneg, add_nonneg, mul_self_nonneg]) <;>
      (try
        nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ ^ 2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ / S.ѕЙ) ^ 2), Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : вДЭ) вЙ§ вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ ^ 2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ / S.ѕЙ) ^ 2 by positivity)])
    exact hвВБ
  ¬Ј -- Prove the reverse direction: if the norm condition holds, then the velocity is zero
    intro h
    have hвВБ : вИВвВЬ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 := by
      have hвВВ : вАЦIC.trajectory S tвАЦ = вИЪ(вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ ^ 2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ / S.ѕЙ) ^ 2) := h
      -- Use the norm condition to show that the velocity is zero
      simp_all [trajectory_eq, trajectory_velocity, norm_add_sq, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul,
        abs_of_nonneg, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq, sq_nonneg, add_nonneg, mul_self_nonneg]
      <;>
      (try
        norm_num) <;>
      (try
        field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq, sq_nonneg, add_nonneg, mul_self_nonneg]) <;>
      (try
        ring_nf) <;>
      (try
        norm_num) <;>
      (try
        linarith) <;>
      (try
        simp_all [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq, sq_nonneg, add_nonneg, mul_self_nonneg]) <;>
      (try
        nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ ^ 2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ / S.ѕЙ) ^ 2), Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : вДЭ) вЙ§ вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ ^ 2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ / S.ѕЙ) ^ 2 by positivity)])
    exact hвВБ

have hвВБ : S.ѕЙ вЙ† 0 := by exact ѕЙ_neq_zero S
  constructor
  ¬Ј intro h
    have hвВВ : вИВвВЬ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 := h
    have hвВГ : SиГљйЗПеЃИжБТ := by sorry
    have hвВД : вАЦ(IC.trajectory S) tвАЦ = вИЪ(вАЦIC.xвВАвАЦ ^ 2 + (вАЦIC.vвВАвАЦ / S.ѕЙ) ^ 2) := by sorry

  ¬Ј intro h
